title: Presentator Sidecar Config
description: Presentation configuration stored in <svgname>.presentator.yaml alongside the source SVG file.

aspect_ratio.description: Viewport shape as "width:height" (e.g. "16:9"). Both components must be positive integers.

background_color.description: CSS color shown in the letterbox area outside the SVG content region.

pointer_color.description: CSS color for pointer indicators (click ripples and draw strokes) in presentation mode.

exclude_id_pattern.description: Regexp applied to visual SVG element IDs after structural filtering. Matching IDs are excluded from the element picker but can still appear in a step's hidden list and will be hidden in the viewport. Invalid patterns are silently ignored.

transition.description: Global default transition applied to all inter-step gaps that have no per-gap override.

transitions.description: Per-gap transition overrides. transitions[i] governs the transition between step i and step i+1. Length should equal steps.length - 1. Missing entries fall back to the global transition default.

overlays.description: Markdown content overlays rendered onto the presentation canvas. Each overlay is positioned in SVG coordinate space and rendered via a Markdown→Typst→SVG pipeline. Visibility is controlled per step via the step's hidden_overlays field.

TransitionConfig.description: Animated transition between two consecutive steps.

easing.description: CSS easing function for the viewport interpolation.

blend.description: When true, elements entering or leaving visibility cross-fade instead of changing instantly.

blend_easing.description: CSS easing function for element cross-fading. Only applied when blend is true.

Step.description: A single presentation step with a named viewport and element/overlay visibility state.

name.description: Human-readable step name shown in the step list and as a label on the editing canvas.

hidden.description: IDs of visual SVG elements to hide for this step. All other visual elements remain visible. See the Visual Elements section for which IDs are eligible.

hidden_overlays.description: IDs of markdown overlays (defined in the top-level overlays list) to hide for this step. Overlays not listed here remain visible.

Viewport.description: Camera definition for a step: where to look and at what zoom and rotation.

center.description: Center point as [x, y], normalized 0–1 relative to the SVG viewBox. [0,0] = top-left corner, [1,1] = bottom-right corner, [0.5,0.5] = center.

zoom.description: Scale factor. 1.0 fits the entire SVG into the viewport. Values greater than 1 zoom in.

rotation.description: Viewport rotation in degrees. Positive values rotate clockwise.

MarkdownOverlay.description: A markdown text block rendered as an SVG overlay positioned in the SVG coordinate space. The markdown is compiled to SVG via a Markdown→Typst→SVG pipeline; the result is cached on disk by content and style hash.

id.description: Unique overlay identifier. Referenced by step hidden_overlays lists to control per-step visibility.

content.description: Markdown source text to render. Supports standard CommonMark syntax (headings, emphasis, lists, code spans).
examples:
Key point:
- Item one
- Item two

x.description: Horizontal position of the overlay's top-left corner in SVG coordinate units.

y.description: Vertical position of the overlay's top-left corner in SVG coordinate units.

width.description: Width of the overlay in SVG coordinate units. Height is derived automatically from the rendered content.

rotation.description: Rotation in degrees applied around the overlay's center point.

OverlayStyle.description: Text rendering style for a markdown overlay.

font_size_pt.description: Base font size in typographic points.

font_family.description: Font family name passed to the Typst renderer. Must be available in the system font path.

text_align.description: Text alignment applied to the rendered markdown content.

render_width_pct.description: Percentage of a fixed 2000pt internal canvas used as the Typst page width for text wrapping (e.g. 20 → 400pt). This is independent of the overlay's on-canvas display width.

background_color.description: CSS color for the snippet background. When unset (default), the background is transparent. Set to a color value like "#ff0000" to fill the snippet area.

border_width.description: Border thickness in typographic points. Set to 0 (default) for no border.

border_style.description: Border line style. Only applied when border_width > 0.

border_color.description: CSS color for the border. Only applied when border_width > 0.

border_radius.description: Corner rounding radius in typographic points. Affects all four corners equally.

padding.description: Padding inside the snippet bounds in typographic points. Adds space between the content and the border/background edge. Useful when a border or background is applied.
